title: Bridge Essay: Putting our heads together: interpersonal neural synchronization as a biological

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Social Incarnation** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Social Incarnation — intersubjectivity, embodied empathy, social predictive processing.

**Putting our heads together: interpersonal neural synchronization as abiological mechanism for shared intentionality.**. Social cognitive and affective neuroscience.. PMID: 30060130. DOI: 10.1093/scan/nsy060. Shared intentionality, or collaborative interactions in which individuals have ashared goal and must coordinate their efforts, is acore component of human interaction. However, the biological bases of shared intentionality and, specifically, the processes by which the brain adjusts to the sharing of common goals, remain largely unknown.
